no: EET compatible since v3.2. Adds new romance dialogues and encounters for Dorn. Females can get more intimate with so-bad-he-sold-his-soul boy Dorn.Install Dorn Romance before ALL other mods that add or modify BG2 dialog for Dorn!. Removed from Mod Forge Ultimate: Mod bug - DORN25J.d APPENDs state 300 which already exists in base game dialogue, causing duplicate label error (cannot resolve label). Needs mod update to fix state numbering.
sum: romance expansion mod for Dorn NPC- BG2:EE
